supplier: Big Duck Canvas / A. Wool & Sons
notes: Pre-cut to 60×54"; 1.0 yd is enough for body+gusset+straps with careful nesting, +0.5 yd for stiffener panel and end tabs and a margin for re-cuts.
Used on every interior seam; estimate generously.

description: YKK #10 molded coil zipper, 20", two-way pulls, color: black
notes: Continuous-tape #10 also OK; pulls can be added separately.
Two 8"×1.25" pieces nest from a 12×12 sheet with offcuts for future projects.
Optional bottom stiffener. Cut to 5×17 with rounded corners.

description: Bonded polyester thread, Tex 70 (V-69), black, 4 oz cone
notes: Approx 1,400 yd; one cone covers this build with margin.

description: Bonded polyester thread, Tex 90, black, 4 oz cone (topstitch)
notes: Topstitching only; if you skip topstitching to save time, drop this line.
One pack covers the build with spares; expect 1-2 broken needles when crossing strap stacks.

description: Wonder clips (Clover or generic), pack of 50
notes: Pins won't go through 4 layers of waxed canvas; clips are essential.
For re-waxing high-wear seams after build.

supplier: Estimate ~$95 if you skip M-08 topstitch thread, M-12 topstitch needle, and M-14 re-wax (~$23 in optionals). Re-using a thread cone from a previous project drops another ~$8.
